description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND TTS is turned ON
AND the user is on the Create Free Account page

steps.action:
WHEN the "Marketing Emails" checkbox is unchecked
AND the user navigates to the "Marketing Emails" checkbox
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "You are currently not opted in to receive commercial emails from MLB.com and their partners. Press select to check the box if you would like to receive commercial emails from MLB.com and their partners. Press or scroll up to navigate to your password creation field. Press or scroll down to submit your new account information."
